name: Pesto and Sun Dried Tomato Torta
recipeIngredient: Fresh Basil Leaves or Parsley Sprigs - For Garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor or with a mixer, blend cream cheese and butter until smooth.
2. Stir in onion just to blend.
3. Line a 2-cup bowl with plastic wrap.
4. Layer 1/3 of the cheese mixture in the bottom.
5. Spread with 1/2 of the pesto, then 1/2 of the sun-dried tomatoes (spread each right to the edge so the layers can be seen when unmolded).
6. Add a second layer of cheese.
7. Spread with remaining pesto, then sun-dried tomatoes.
8. Spread remaining cheese on top.
9. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
10. Unmold at serving time and remove plastic wrap.
11. Press pine nuts into the surface.
12. Garnish with fresh basil leaves or parsley sprigs.
Makes about 2 cups
